testcase.name: test_livekit_is_configured

failure.message: AssertionError: LiveKit not configured or unreachable: {'ok': False, 'reason': 'LiveKit non configuré. Renseignez api_key/api_secret/ws_url dans Admin → Paiements → Paramètres (ou LIVEKIT_* dans .env).'} assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa16659a2c40>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa16659a2c40> = {'ok': False, 'reason': 'LiveKit non configuré. Renseignez api_key/api_secret/ws_url dans Admin → Paiements → Paramètres (ou LIVEKIT_* dans .env).'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration53_livekit_sprintB.py:59: in test_livekit_is_configured assert body.get("ok") is True, f"LiveKit not configured or unreachable: {body}" E AssertionError: LiveKit not configured or unreachable: {'ok': False, 'reason': 'LiveKit non configuré. Renseignez api_key/api_secret/ws_url dans Admin → Paiements → Paramètres (ou LIVEKIT_* dans .env).'} E assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa16659a2c40>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa16659a2c40> = {'ok': False, 'reason': 'LiveKit non configuré. Renseignez api_key/api_secret/ws_url dans Admin → Paiements → Paramètres (ou LIVEKIT_* dans .env).'}.get

testcase.name: test_create_p2p_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration53_livekit_sprintB.py:79: in test_create_p2p_session assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Appels non disponibles — le serveur LiveKit n'est pas encore configuré."} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
